name: Hard CSV parser (samples>=2)
goal: `pkg/csvkit.py::parse_line` must split on commas but respect simple double quotes. Hard task — sample repair path enabled (samples>=2). Multi-file with `pkg/loader.py`.

gold_fix.new_body:
def parse_line(line):
    out = []
    cur = []
    in_q = False
    i = 0
    s = line or ""
    while i < len(s):
        ch = s[i]
        if ch == '"':
            in_q = not in_q
        elif ch == "," and not in_q:
            out.append("".join(cur))
            cur = []
        else:
            cur.append(ch)
        i += 1
    out.append("".join(cur))
    return out
